vocab.meaning: thời trang quan trọng hơn công năng
vocab.example: In my early twenties, I always prioritized fashion over function, often enduring blisters for the sake of a sharp look.

vocab.meaning: đệm lót và khả năng hấp thụ xung lực
vocab.example: Since I spend a lot of time on my feet, I look for footwear with superior cushioning and shock absorption.

vocab.meaning: giày đóng thủ công (theo yêu cầu riêng)
vocab.example: If I could afford it, I would invest in bespoke footwear to get that perfect harmony of style and anatomical fit.

vocab.meaning: vẻ ngoài lịch lãm, phô trương và đầy phong cách
vocab.example: I sometimes opt for sneakers with significant visual panache to act as a statement piece for an otherwise dull outfit.

vocab.meaning: tốt/hợp lý về mặt sinh lý học (tốt cho cơ thể)
vocab.example: I've realized that wearing shoes that are physiologically sound is much more beneficial for my posture in the long run.

vocab.meaning: sức quyến rũ của thời trang cao cấp
vocab.example: Despite the discomfort, the allure of high fashion sometimes tempts me into buying rather impractical formal shoes.
I prefer loafers made from supple leather because they conform to the shape of my feet almost instantly.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn sự bền bỉ/tuổi thọ lâu dài
vocab.example: Rather than following fleeting trends, I opt for longevity by choosing classic, sturdy designs that never go out of style.
I am increasingly mindful of my podiatric health, so I steer clear of any shoes that compress my toes.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: My aesthetic sensibilities usually drive me toward minimalist silhouettes that still provide a decent level of comfort.
